Source: https://www.python.org/ftp/python/3.14.3/Python-3.14.3.tgz

Config:
Check Mac/README.rst for info

Modify configure script to build for arm64e instead of x86_64:

universal2)
               UNIVERSAL_ARCH_FLAGS="-arch arm64 -arch arm64e"
               LIPO_32BIT_FLAGS=""
               ARCH_RUN_32BIT="true"
               ARCH_TRIPLES=`echo {aarch64}-apple-darwin`
               ;;

Find all references to "univeral2" and whereever you see x86_64/intel specifics, remove it, and add arm64e as needed.

If we have zstd installed from homebrew:
brew unlink zstd

env MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=15.6 ./configure --enable-framework=/Users/msp/Desktop/python-install/ --enable-universalsdk --with-universal-archs=universal2 --enable-optimizations --with-lto --without-zstd

env MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=15.6 make
sudo make install # sudo is needed otherwise everything won't be installed, will install in /usr/local/bin/

If we had zstd installed from homebrew before:
brew link zstd

Copy ~/Desktop/python-install/Python.framework/ to ~/Desktop/Python.framework/ for framework we will modify
cd ~/Desktop/Python.framework/
rm -rf Resources/Python.app
rm -rf Resources/English.lproj
unlink Versions/3.14/Headers
rm -rf Versions/3.14/share
mv Versions/3.14/include/python3.14/ Versions/3.14/Headers/
rm -rf Versions/3.14/include
~/Desktop/python-install/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/bin/python3.14 -m compileall ~/Desktop/Python.framework/Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14 -b
rm -rf Versions/3.14/bin/
rm -rf Versions/3.14/lib/pkgconfig/
rm -rf Versions/3.14/lib/libpython3.14.dylib
find Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14  -name "*\.py" -delete
Remove all __pycache__ directories in Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14

cd Versions/3.14/lib/python3.14
rm -rf __phello__
rm antigravity.pyc
rm cgi.pyc
rm -rf config-3.14-darwin
rm -rf ctypes/test/
rm -rf curses
rm -rf distutils
rm -rf email
rm -rf ensurepip
rm -rf idlelib
rm -rf lib2to3
rm LICENSE.txt
rm -rf site-packages
rm -rf sqlite3/test
rm -rf test
rm -rf tkinter
rm turtle.pyc
rm -rf turtledemo
rm -rf unittest
rm -rf wsgiref
rm doctest.pyc
rm pydoc.pyc
rm -rf venv
rm -rf lib2to3
rm -rf idle lib

rm __hello__.pyc

cd lib-dynload
rm _curses_panel.cpython-314-darwin.so
rm _curses.cpython-314-darwin.so

cd ~/Desktop/Python.framework/
rm Headers

mv Versions/Current/lib/python3.14 Versions/Current/Resources/python3.14
rm -rf Versions/Current/lib

mv Versions/Current/Resources/python3.14/lib-dynload Versions/Current/Frameworks
mv Versions/3.14/ Versions/A

cd Versions
rm Current
ln -s A Current

ln -s Versions/Current/Headers
mv Versions/A/Resources/python3.14 Versions/A/Resources/python 

cd ~/Desktop/Python.framework/
install_name_tool -id "@rpath/Python.framework/Versions/A/Python" Versions/Current/Python

cd ~/Desktop
codesign --deep -f -s "-" Python.framework

Update LICENSE url to new python release URL
Update code to look for "python3.x" for library loading
